content:
Thunderbird Android doesn't support direct email sync between desktop and phone.

You can add your feature suggestion, or vote for existing ideas on Mozilla Connect. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/idb-p/ideas/label-name/thunderbird%20android

One similar to your own is open for votes, linked below. https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/directly-transferring-emails-from-thunderbird-desktop-to-the/idi-p/114526
creator: platform34
